errors.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection.

auth.magic_link_sent: Check your email for the magic link!
auth.dev_magic_link_msg: Magic link generated locally. Token auto-filled below for dev.

meta.title: Inko | Learn Languages by Typing
meta.description: Build vocabulary with typing-first practice, Anki deck import, community deck sharing, text-to-speech, and progress tracking.

hero.title: type it until you own it
hero.subtitle: Import Anki decks, train by typing, and publish curated decks back to a community library with moderation built in.

how_it_works.title: // How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Three steps to never forgetting again

step1.title: Import or Create
step1.desc: Start from scratch, upload Anki packages with field mapping, or pull from community decks.

step2.title: Type Answers
step2.desc: No multiple choice. Recall the answer from memory and type it out.

step3.title: Review and Share
step3.desc: Train with smart scheduling, then submit your best decks to the moderated community library.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Typing-first practice, smart review timing, Anki migration, and community publishing in one loop.

typing_first.title: Typing First
typing_first.desc: No multiple choice. No matching. Type your answers from memory to build real neural pathways.

spaced_repetition.title: Spaced Repetition
spaced_repetition.desc: Smart scheduling surfaces cards right before you forget. Every review is perfectly timed.

progress_tracking.title: Progress Tracking
progress_tracking.desc: Visual dashboards show mastery levels, streaks, and weak spots so you know exactly where to focus.

custom_decks.title: Anki Import + Mapping
custom_decks.desc: Upload `.apkg`, `.colpkg`, `.csv`, or pasted exports, inspect note fields, and map them into your deck cleanly.

tts_support.title: Community Decks
tts_support.desc: Browse public decks, inspect sample cards, clone useful sets, and submit your own edited decks for review.

practice_anywhere.title: Pronunciation + Media
practice_anywhere.desc: Keep TTS support and imported Anki audio in the same study flow, so listening and typing reinforce each other.

cta.title: Master anything by typing.
cta.subtitle: Bring your existing decks, refine them, and share the good ones back.

footer.desc: Type it until you own it. Import Anki decks, build better study sets, and share them through a moderated community library.

dashboard.create_first_deck_cta: Build your first deck to begin
dashboard.deck_focus_hint: Press p to focus this grid fast

session_details.no_attempts: No attempt data recorded for this session.

decks.title: Decks
decks.create_or_import_desc: Start a new deck here, or bring in an Anki deck with field mapping.
decks.select_deck_desc: Choose a deck from the sidebar to manage your vocabulary.

add.title: Add to {{deck}}
add.example_placeholder_jp: e.g. 毎日日本語を勉強しています。

import.instruction: Upload a CSV/TSV file or paste data directly. Supported columns: target, reading, meaning, romanization, example, tags
import.format_hint: Format: target, reading, meaning, romanization, example, tags
import.map_instruction: Map each column to the correct field:

words.title: Words
words.try_different: Try a different search term or clear the filter.
words.add_using_form: Add words using the form above.
words.select_deck: Select a deck to view and manage its words.
words.select_deck_desc: Choose a deck from the sidebar to manage your vocabulary.

delete_deck.title: Delete Deck
delete_deck.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This will remove the deck and unlink all words from it. Words in other decks will not be affected.

export.error: Couldn't download this deck right now. Try again.

publish.title: Publish deck to community
publish.description: Submit your edited deck to the moderation queue so it can be reviewed for the public library.
publish.review_note: Community submissions are reviewed before they appear publicly.
publish.submit_failed: Couldn't submit this deck right now. Try again.
publish.empty_deck: Add at least one card before publishing this deck.
publish.default_description: User-edited {{language}} deck exported from the word bank and submitted for community moderation.

messages.clipboard_denied: Clipboard permission denied. Copy manually from export file.
messages.deck_export_failed: Couldn't download your deck data right now. Try again.

preferences.interface_language_desc: Choose the app language here on mobile or desktop. Your selection is stored on this device.
preferences.typing_mode_desc: Language-specific uses script-aware matching (e.g. romaji to kana for Japanese). Universal uses normalized direct typing.

srs.title: Advanced Spaced Repetition
srs.desc: Tune how quickly strengths move and how long each mastery band waits before the next review.

about.desc: A minimal, focused language typing practice app inspired by monkeytype.

takeout.title: Data Takeout
takeout.description: Download your deck data as CSV files you can keep or import elsewhere.
takeout.empty: No decks available to export yet.

practice.session_starting: Session is still starting. Try again.
practice.esc_hint: Press Esc again within 1 second to exit
practice.end_confirm_desc: Progress for this session will be saved.
practice.no_words_available: No words available in this deck yet.
practice.audio_challenge_body: The prompt is hidden in this mode. Replay the audio if you need another pass, then type the word exactly.
practice.audio_challenge_prompt: listen and type what you hear...
practice.audio_challenge_desc: Audio challenge hides the prompt so you answer from sound alone.
practice.shortcuts_desc: Quick controls for audio and exit.
practice.clean_streak_desc: Clean streak only increases when you finish a card without ever going off track.

importer.title: Import Anki decks with explicit field mapping.
importer.subtitle: Upload an `.apkg`, `.colpkg`, `.csv`, or tab-separated note export, inspect the extracted fields, and import only the columns you want.
importer.empty_state: Upload a file, paste a note export, or choose a community deck to generate the mapping table and preview.

destination.blocked: Import is blocked until you choose or create a destination deck.

upload.title: Drop an Anki package or note export here
upload.support: Supports `.apkg`, `.colpkg`, `.csv`, `.tsv`, and text exports with a header row.
upload.drop_now: Drop the file to upload it.

paste.placeholder:
Front	Reading	Meaning	Example
食べる	たべる	to eat	私は寿司を食べる。

mapping.cards_ready: {{count}} cards will import with the current mapping

preview.required_prefix: Required: map at least one column to

submission.subtitle: Send this mapped deck to the moderation queue for approval into the public library.
submission.default_summary: Imported {{count}} notes prepared for Inko community review.
submission.default_description: Converted from {{sourceName}} with explicit field mapping in Inko. Includes {{count}} mapped notes ready for moderation.

errors.map_target_meaning: Map at least target and meaning to import notes.
errors.load_before_submit: Load and map a deck before submitting it.
errors.map_before_submit: Map target and meaning before submitting.
errors.invalid_file: This file does not contain a usable header row and note rows.
errors.invalid_paste: Paste a CSV or TSV export with a header row.

next_step.start_loading: Start by loading a deck export or choosing a community deck.
next_step.choose_destination: Choose or create a destination deck before importing.
next_step.map_target_meaning: Map at least one column to Target and one to Meaning.
next_step.no_cards: Current mapping does not produce any importable cards.
next_step.ready: Ready to import or submit this deck.

detail.rate_copy: Leave a quick score to help other learners judge deck quality before importing.
detail.rate_prompt: Tap a star to add your rating.
detail.sign_in_to_rate: Sign in to leave a rating.
detail.comment_placeholder: What worked well? What should the next learner know?
detail.comment_help: Comments are public on this community deck page.
detail.comments_empty: No comments yet. Be the first to leave context for the next learner.
detail.sign_in_to_comment: Sign in to write a comment.
detail.sign_in_required: Sign in to rate or comment on community decks.

library.seo_description: Browse community-built language decks, inspect note fields, and import them into Inko.
library.title: Discover shared decks before you import them.
library.subtitle: Review note types, field layouts, and sample cards before moving anything into your personal word bank.
library.empty: No published community decks match this filter yet.

moderation.title: Review community deck submissions.
moderation.subtitle: Approve clean deck submissions into the public library or reject low-quality uploads with review notes.
moderation.notes_placeholder: Why this was approved or rejected
moderation.access_denied: Moderator access is not enabled for this account.
moderation.access_denied_help: Add your email to `MODERATOR_EMAILS` on the API server to unlock this queue.
moderation.catalog_note: Moderation writes directly into the published community deck catalog.

submissions.title: Track the decks you've submitted.
submissions.subtitle: Review moderation status, sample cards, and any notes left by moderators.
submissions.empty: You haven't submitted any decks yet.
submissions.discard_help: You can discard pending or rejected submissions from your own queue.
submissions.published_locked: Approved submissions stay locked here because they may already be published in the community library.
